SECTION_H.TITLE: Proposed Travel or Further Stay Details

SECTION_I.TITLE: Address(es) in Australia
SECTION_I.31: Do you know any details of the places you will stay during your time in Australia (eg. Hotel, friends, relatives) ?
SECTION_I.33: Do you have any other addresses in Australia that have not been declared at question 17 ?

SECTION_J.TITLE: Australian Visa History
SECTION_J.34_1: Type of visa you hold reason for journey (eg. Visitor, business)
SECTION_J.35: Have you been to Australia before ?
SECTION_J.35_1: Type of visa you hold reason for

SECTION_K.TITLE: Character
SECTION_K.36: Have you, or any other person included in this application, ever:
SECTION_K.36_1: Been charged with any offence that is currently awaiting legal action?
SECTION_K.36_2: Been convicted of an offence in any country (including any conviction which is now removed from official records)?
SECTION_K.36_3: Been charged or convicted of family or domestic violence offences or similar related offences?
SECTION_K.36_4: Been the subject of a domestic or family violence order, or any other order, of a tribunal or court or other similar authority, for the personal protection of another person?
SECTION_K.36_5: Been the subject of an arrest warrant or Interpol notice?
SECTION_K.36_6: Been found guilty of a sexually based offence involving a child (including where no conviction was recorded)?
SECTION_K.36_7: Been named on a sex offender register?
SECTION_K.36_8: Been acquitted of any offence on the grounds of unsoundness of mind or insanity?
SECTION_K.36_9: Been found by a court not fit to plead?
SECTION_K.36_10: Been directly or indirectly involved in, or associated with, activities which would represent a risk to national security in Australia or any other country?
SECTION_K.36_11: Been charged with, or indicted for: genocide, war crimes, crimes against humanity, torture, slavery, or any other crime that is otherwise of a serious international concern?
SECTION_K.36_12: Been associated with a person, group or organisation that has been/is involved in criminal conduct?
SECTION_K.36_13: Been associated with an organisation engaged in violence or engaged in acts of violence (including war, insurgency, freedom fighting, terrorism, protest) either overseas or in Australia?
SECTION_K.36_14: Served in a military force, police force, state-sponsored/private militia or intelligence agency (including secret police)?
SECTION_K.36_15: Undergone any military/paramilitary training, been trained in weapons/explosives or in the manufacture of chemical/biological products?
SECTION_K.36_16: Been involved in people smuggling or people trafficking offences?
SECTION_K.36_17: Been removed, deported or excluded from any country (including Australia)?
SECTION_K.36_18: Overstayed a visa in any country (including Australia)?
SECTION_K.36_19: Had any outstanding debts to the Australian Government or any public authority in Australia?
SECTION_K.36_20: If you answered ‘Yes’ to any question at Question 36, give details, including the date of the charge, the outcome and any penalty imposed. Also attach court documents (for example sentencing remarks or court transcripts).

SECTION_L.TITLE: Military Service
SECTION_L.37: Have you undertaken any military service ?

SECTION_M.TITLE: Employed by Intelligence or Security Agency
SECTION_M.38: Are you currently, or have you been employed as an intelligence officer or an agent of an intelligence or security agency?
SECTION_M.38_1: Give details of the organisation, your role, and the dates you served

SECTION_N.TITLE: Visa Refusals
SECTION_N.39: Have you ever been refused a visa to any country?
SECTION_N.39_1: Give dates of refusal, countries, and circumstances of refusal

SECTION_O.TITLE: Deportations
SECTION_O.40: Have you ever been excluded, asked to leave, deported or removed from any country?
SECTION_O.40_1: Give details of dates, countries, and circumstances

SECTION_P.TITLE: Citizenship Refusals
SECTION_P.41: Have you ever been refused, renounced, or rescinded citizenship of any country?
SECTION_P.41_1: Give dates of refusal, countries, and circumstances of refusal

SECTION_Q.TITLE: Associated people
SECTION_Q.42_sub: Note: If widowed, you must provide details about the deceased partner.
SECTION_Q.42_11: Country of current residence (If not living, write ‘DECEASED’)
SECTION_Q.43_sub: Note: This includes biological and adopted children.
SECTION_Q.44: Do you know details of your parents ?
SECTION_Q.44_sub: Note: This includes biological and adoptive parents.
SECTION_Q.45_sub: Siblings include full, half, and adopted brothers and sisters.
SECTION_Q.46_sub: Are there any other family members included in the visa application ?
SECTION_Q.46_sub_2: Family members include nieces, nephews, cousins, in-laws, grandparents etc. who are travelling with you
SECTION_Q.47: Do you have any personal contacts in Australia ?
SECTION_Q.47_sub: Personal contacts include visa sponsors, any relatives, friends, family members and acquaintances in Australia
SECTION_Q.48: Do you have any other personal contacts in Australia ?

SECTION_R.49: Are you being sponsored by, or associated with, a business or organisation in Australia?

SECTION_R.52: Does the employer/business have telephone numbers?

PHAN_1.TITLE: General Information
PHAN_1.NAME: Your full name:
PHAN_1.CHINHTHUC_VOCHONG: Date you officially became spouses (if married):
PHAN_1.NGAY_CHUNGSONG: Date you started living together (if applicable):

PHAN_2.TITLE: Meeting Circumstances
PHAN_2.FIRST_MEET_PLACE: Where and when did you first meet?
PHAN_2.FIRST_IMPRESSION: What was your first impression of your spouse?
PHAN_2.ATTRACTION: What attracted you to your spouse?
PHAN_2.INITIAL_DISCUSSIONS: What activities or topics did you usually discuss when you first met?
PHAN_2.OFFICIAL_DATING: When did you officially start dating?
PHAN_2.MEETING_FREQUENCY: At the beginning of your relationship, how often did you meet per week?

PHAN_3.TITLE: Living Together and Daily Life
PHAN_3.START_LIVING_TOGETHER: When did you start living together?
PHAN_3.FIRST_HOME_ADDRESS: What was the first address where you lived together?
PHAN_3.WHO_SUGGESTED: Who suggested that you move in together?
PHAN_3.HOUSEWORK_DIVISION: How do you divide household chores?
PHAN_3.DAILY_ACTIVITIES: What daily activities do you often do together?
PHAN_3.COVID_ADAPTATION: How did you adapt to life during the COVID-19 pandemic?

PHAN_4.TITLE: Work and Finances
PHAN_4.WORK_TOGETHER: Do you work together at the same place?
PHAN_4.DES_WORK_TOGETHER: If yes, please describe each person's job.
PHAN_4.JOINT_BANK_ACCOUNT: Do you have a joint bank account?
PHAN_4.DES_JOINT_BANK_ACCOUNT: If yes, please specify the bank and the date the account was opened.
PHAN_4.SHARED_EXPENSES: What are the shared expenses that you both contribute to monthly?
PHAN_4.JOINT_LOANS_INVESTMENTS: Do you have any joint loans or financial investments?
PHAN_4.JOINT_ASSETS: If you have shared assets (such as a car, house), please describe them in detail.

PHAN_5.TITLE: Traveling Together
PHAN_5.DES_TRAVEL_HISTORY: If yes, please list the places you have visited.
PHAN_5.MEMORABLE_TRIP: Describe a memorable experience from a trip you took together.
PHAN_5.FUTURE_TRAVEL_PLANS: Do you have any future travel plans together?

INTRODUCING_FAMILY.QUESTION: How did you introduce each other to your families?
INTRODUCING_FAMILY.DES: Describe the process, timing, and your families' reactions when you introduced each other.

MEETING_IN_LAWS.QUESTION: Have you met your spouse’s parents? What were their thoughts about you?
MEETING_IN_LAWS.DES: Provide details about the meeting, location, and any comments from your spouse’s parents.

SPOUSE_MEETING_PARENTS.QUESTION: Has your spouse met your parents? What were their thoughts about your spouse?
SPOUSE_MEETING_PARENTS.DES: Describe your family’s reaction, especially your parents’ opinions about your spouse.

FAMILY_EVENTS.QUESTION: Have you participated in family events or gatherings with mutual friends?
FAMILY_EVENTS.DES: List important occasions such as weddings, birthdays, family reunions, or special events.

COMMON_FRIENDS.QUESTION: Do you have mutual friends? If so, who are your closest mutual friends?
COMMON_FRIENDS.DES: List significant mutual friends and their role in your relationship.

MARRIAGE_PLANS.QUESTION: Do you have plans to get married? If already married, how do you plan to celebrate your wedding anniversaries?
MARRIAGE_PLANS.DES: If not married, share specific plans. If married, describe how you plan to celebrate anniversaries.

CHILD_PLANS.QUESTION: Do you plan to have children? If so, describe your parenting and educational aspirations.
CHILD_PLANS.DES: Share your desired number of children, parenting style, education plans, and family values you wish to pass on.

SETTLEMENT_PLANS.QUESTION: Do you plan to buy a house or settle permanently in Australia?
SETTLEMENT_PLANS.DES: If yes, describe your financial plans, preferred location, and reasons for choosing that place.

OTHER_FUTURE_PLANS.QUESTION: What other future plans do you have together?
OTHER_FUTURE_PLANS.DES: This may include travel plans, joint investments, education, or career development.

RELATIONSHIP_BELIEF.QUESTION: What makes you believe that your relationship is genuine and long-lasting?
RELATIONSHIP_BELIEF.DES: Share factors such as love, trust, shared values, and common goals.

CONFLICT_RESOLUTION.QUESTION: If difficulties arise in your relationship, how do you resolve them?
CONFLICT_RESOLUTION.DES: Describe how you handle conflicts, communicate, and the lessons you've learned.

ADDITIONAL_SHARING.QUESTION: Is there anything else you would like to share about your relationship?
ADDITIONAL_SHARING.DES: Anything important or special about your relationship that hasn't been covered.

QUESTION_3.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_3.SUB_QUESTION_1: Have you ever lived with these two people?
QUESTION_3.SUB_QUESTION_2: If yes, how long have you lived with them?
QUESTION_3.SUB_QUESTION_3: Reason for living with one of them?
QUESTION_3.SUB_QUESTION_4: Was the rental shared or how was it arranged?

QUESTION_4.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_4.SUB_QUESTION_1: How long have you known the couple, and under what circumstances?
QUESTION_4.SUB_QUESTION_3: When did you meet the other person?
QUESTION_4.SUB_QUESTION_4: Please list the number of years you have known the couple and the circumstances.
QUESTION_4.EXAMPLE: Example: Have known them for 5 years, worked together, met through mutual friends...

QUESTION_5.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_5.SUB_QUESTION_1: Do you often meet the couple (or one of them)?
QUESTION_5.SUB_QUESTION_3: When was the last time you saw them?
QUESTION_5.SUB_QUESTION_4: Who are you closer to, and with whom do you talk more often?

QUESTION_6.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_6.SUB_QUESTION_1: If the couple is married, did you attend their wedding?
QUESTION_6.SUB_QUESTION_2: Do you remember the time and location of their wedding?
QUESTION_6.SUB_QUESTION_3: How did they behave towards each other at the wedding?
QUESTION_6.SUB_QUESTION_4: Did they show any affectionate gestures towards each other?

QUESTION_7.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_7.SUB_QUESTION_1: What are your thoughts on each person's personality?
QUESTION_7.SUB_QUESTION_2: Are they compatible in terms of personality?
QUESTION_7.SUB_QUESTION_3: If yes, please list the reasons why you think so.

QUESTION_8.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_8.SUB_QUESTION_1: Do you believe their relationship is real and ongoing?
QUESTION_8.SUB_QUESTION_2: Please list the reasons why you believe in their relationship.
QUESTION_8.SUB_QUESTION_3: Have you noticed any changes in them because of each other?

QUESTION_9.TITLE: Answer the following questions:
QUESTION_9.SUB_QUESTION_1: Have you ever heard them talk about or are you aware of their future plans?
